signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION ROSE TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION ROSE TO 2.2% YoY IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% PRIOR BUT BELOW 2.4% FORECASTS | NO | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, per Statistics Korea data reported by Trading Economics; this missed market expectations of 2.4% and stayed near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures
